query:
-- Fix 2250016: CLE @ SEA (CORRECT orientation — CLE=away, SEA=home)
-- AN: CLE away ML=+152, SEA home ML=-180, spread CLE+1.5(-160)/SEA-1.5(+132), total=6.5 over=-115 under=-105
UPDATE games SET
  awayBookSpread      = 1.5,
  homeBookSpread      = -1.5,
  awaySpreadOdds      = '-160',
  homeSpreadOdds      = '132',
  bookTotal           = 6.5,
  overOdds            = '-115',
  underOdds           = '-105',
  awayML              = '152',
  homeML              = '-180',
  openAwaySpread      = '1.5',
  openHomeSpread      = '-1.5',
  openTotal           = '6.5',
  openAwaySpreadOdds  = '-160',
  openHomeSpreadOdds  = '132',
  openAwayML          = '152',
  openHomeML          = '-180'
WHERE id = 2250016;

-- Fix 2252284: ARI @ LAD (REVERSED — DB has ARI=away, LAD=home; AN has LAD=away, ARI=home)
-- AN: LAD away ML=+200, ARI home ML=-245, spread LAD+1.5(-102)/ARI-1.5(-118), total=8.5 over=-115 under=-105
-- DB away=ARI=AN home → awayML=AN homeML=-245, homeML=AN awayML=+200
-- DB awayBookSpread=ARI=AN homeBookSpread=-1.5, homeBookSpread=LAD=AN awayBookSpread=+1.5
UPDATE games SET
  awayBookSpread      = -1.5,
  homeBookSpread      = 1.5,
  awaySpreadOdds      = '-118',
  homeSpreadOdds      = '-102',
  bookTotal           = 8.5,
  overOdds            = '-115',
  underOdds           = '-105',
  awayML              = '-245',
  homeML              = '200',
  openAwaySpread      = '-1.5',
  openHomeSpread      = '1.5',
  openTotal           = '8.5',
  openAwaySpreadOdds  = '-118',
  openHomeSpreadOdds  = '-102',
  openAwayML          = '-245',
  openHomeML          = '200'
WHERE id = 2252284;

-- Fix 2252284: ARI @ LAD (REVERSED — DB has ARI=away, LAD=home; AN has LAD=away, ARI=home)
-- AN: LAD away ML=+200, ARI home ML=-245, spread LAD+1.5(-102)/ARI-1.5(-118), total=8.5 over=-115 under=-105
-- DB away=ARI=AN home → awayML=AN homeML=-245, homeML=AN awayML=+200
-- DB awayBookSpread=ARI=AN homeBookSpread=-1.5, homeBookSpread=LAD=AN awayBookSpread=+1.5
UPDATE games SET
  awayBookSpread      = -1.5,
  homeBookSpread      = 1.5,
  awaySpreadOdds      = '-118',
  homeSpreadOdds      = '-102',
  bookTotal           = 8.5,
  overOdds            = '-115',
  underOdds           = '-105',
  awayML              = '-245',
  homeML              = '200',
  openAwaySpread      = '-1.5',
  openHomeSpread      = '1.5',
  openTotal           = '8.5',
  openAwaySpreadOdds  = '-118',
  openHomeSpreadOdds  = '-102',
  openAwayML          = '-245',
  openHomeML          = '200'
WHERE id = 2252284;
